features.description: Web app Tailwind CSS + PostCSS configuration with design token integration
acceptanceSteps: Create apps/web/tailwind.config.ts importing @cyberoracle/tokens/tailwind preset
Create apps/web/postcss.config.mjs with tailwindcss + autoprefixer plugins
Create apps/web/app/globals.css with @tailwind base/components/utilities directives
pnpm dev:web starts without errors
A test page renders with token-derived Tailwind classes visible

features.description: Vitest configuration for packages/core — enables TDD workflow for schemas, prompts, safety
acceptanceSteps: Create packages/core/vitest.config.ts with path alias resolution for @cyberoracle/*
pnpm --filter @cyberoracle/core vitest run succeeds with zero tests (exit 0)
Create a placeholder test packages/core/src/__tests__/health.test.ts that asserts true
pnpm test from root includes core package results

features.description: Vitest configuration for packages/poster — enables TDD for render pipeline and templates
acceptanceSteps: Create packages/poster/vitest.config.ts with React plugin + path alias resolution
pnpm --filter @cyberoracle/poster vitest run succeeds with zero tests
Create a placeholder test packages/poster/src/__tests__/health.test.ts
pnpm test from root includes poster package results

features.description: Server Dockerfile (multi-stage) + docker-compose.yml for local development
acceptanceSteps: Create apps/server/Dockerfile with three stages: deps (install) → builder (build) → runner (standalone)
Dockerfile copies monorepo context, runs pnpm install --frozen-lockfile, builds server
Runner stage uses node:20-bookworm-slim, copies standalone output + static + fonts
Create docker-compose.yml at root with 'server' service building from apps/server/Dockerfile
docker compose build server succeeds (or manual review confirms Dockerfile correctness)

features.description: End-to-end dev verification — pnpm dev:web starts both web and server without errors
acceptanceSteps: pnpm dev:web starts web on port 3000 and server on port 3001
GET http://localhost:3000 returns 200 with valid HTML
GET http://localhost:3001/api/health returns 200 with { status: 'ok' } JSON
No unhandled TypeScript errors in terminal output

features.description: Design tokens: color palette with brand colors + poster palette + semantic aliases
acceptanceSteps: Create packages/tokens/src/colors.ts exporting: brand (purple #A855F7, cyan #22D3EE, pink #F472B6), dark (#0B0420), poster (cream #F8F5EE, text #1F1B16, gold #9A7B3F)
Include semantic aliases: primary, secondary, accent, background, surface, text
All values are typed as const objects (not loose strings)
Unit test verifies all color values are valid hex strings

features.description: Design tokens: typography scale, font families, spacing, border radius, animation curves
acceptanceSteps: Create packages/tokens/src/typography.ts: fontFamilies (notoSerifSC, orbitron), typeScale (xs–5xl with lineHeight)
Create packages/tokens/src/spacing.ts: spacing scale (0–96 step values)
Create packages/tokens/src/borders.ts: borderRadius (card 16, button 12, input 10)
Create packages/tokens/src/animations.ts: easing (cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)), durations (enter 360ms, exit 220ms)
packages/tokens/src/index.ts re-exports all token modules
Unit test verifies token objects are non-empty and values are correct types

features.description: Tailwind preset from design tokens — maps all tokens to Tailwind theme extensions
acceptanceSteps: Create packages/tokens/src/tailwind-preset.js exporting a Tailwind preset object
Preset extends theme.colors with all token colors
Preset extends theme.fontFamily with notoSerifSC and orbitron
Preset extends theme.borderRadius, theme.transitionTimingFunction, theme.transitionDuration
Unit test imports the preset and verifies it has the required Tailwind config shape

features.description: Zod schema for PalmReadingResult — structured output contract for palm reading pipeline
acceptanceSteps: Create packages/core/src/schemas/palm-reading.ts with Zod object schema
Schema fields: id (uuid), type ('palm'), personality/career/love/health (each with title+content+score), overallScore (1-100), summary (string), createdAt (ISO date string)
Test file: packages/core/src/schemas/__tests__/palm-reading.test.ts
Test: schema.parse(validSampleData) succeeds without errors
Test: schema.parse(missingFieldData) throws ZodError with path to missing field
Export PalmReadingResult type (z.infer) and schema from packages/core/src/schemas/index.ts

features.description: Zod schema for FaceReadingResult — structured output contract for face reading pipeline
acceptanceSteps: Create packages/core/src/schemas/face-reading.ts with Zod object schema
Schema fields: id, type ('face'), fortune/career/relationship/wisdom sections (each with title+content+score), overallScore, summary, createdAt
Test file: packages/core/src/schemas/__tests__/face-reading.test.ts
Test: schema.parse(validSampleData) succeeds
Test: schema.parse(malformedData) throws ZodError
Export from packages/core/src/schemas/index.ts

features.description: Zod schema for DailyFortuneResult — structured output for daily fortune feature
acceptanceSteps: Create packages/core/src/schemas/daily-fortune.ts with Zod object schema
Schema fields: date (string), overall (score+text), love/career/wealth (each score 1-100+text), luckyNumber, luckyColor, summary
Test file: packages/core/src/schemas/__tests__/daily-fortune.test.ts
Test: validates and rejects correctly
Export from packages/core/src/schemas/index.ts

features.description: Zod schema for PipelineEvent — SSE streaming envelope for LLM proxy
acceptanceSteps: Create packages/core/src/schemas/pipeline-event.ts with Zod discriminated union or object schema
Schema: { step: enum(vlm_observe, llm_interpret, complete), status: enum(running, done, error), data: unknown, error?: string }
Test file: packages/core/src/schemas/__tests__/pipeline-event.test.ts
Test: valid events parse, invalid steps/statuses are rejected
Export from packages/core/src/schemas/index.ts

features.description: Sample prompt file: vision-observe-palm.md — establishes .md prompt file format
acceptanceSteps: Create packages/core/prompts/vision-observe-palm.md
File has YAML frontmatter: version, targetModel, temperature, description
Body has system prompt section followed by ---USER--- separator followed by user prompt template
User template uses {{variable}} syntax (e.g. {{ganzhi}}, {{upload_description}})
Prompt content instructs VLM to observe palm features and return structured JSON

features.description: Prompt loader — reads .md prompt files, parses frontmatter, fills template variables
acceptanceSteps: Create packages/core/src/prompts/loader.ts with loadPrompt(name) and fillTemplate(template, vars) functions
loadPrompt('vision-observe-palm') returns { meta: { version, targetModel, temperature }, system: string, userTemplate: string }
fillTemplate('Hello {{name}}', { name: 'World' }) returns 'Hello World'
fillTemplate('Hello {{name}}', {}) leaves 'Hello {{name}}' unchanged (no error)
loadPrompt throws descriptive error for non-existent prompt name
Test file: packages/core/src/prompts/__tests__/loader.test.ts covers all cases

features.description: Content safety module — keyword blacklist checker for filtering LLM outputs
acceptanceSteps: Create packages/core/src/content-safety/blacklist.json with Chinese keyword array (健康建议, 寿命, 疾病, 治疗, 投资建议, 赚钱, 自杀, 死亡, 政治)
Create packages/core/src/content-safety/checker.ts with checkContent(text: string): { safe: boolean, matched: string[] }
checkContent('今日运势不错') returns { safe: true, matched: [] }
checkContent('请注意健康建议') returns { safe: false, matched: ['健康建议'] }
Case-insensitive matching for blacklist keywords
Test file: packages/core/src/content-safety/__tests__/checker.test.ts passes
Export checkContent from packages/core/src/content-safety/index.ts

features.description: Core package barrel exports — wire up all submodules through index.ts files
acceptanceSteps: packages/core/src/index.ts re-exports from ./schemas, ./prompts, ./content-safety
packages/core/src/schemas/index.ts exports all Zod schemas and inferred types
packages/core/src/prompts/index.ts exports loadPrompt and fillTemplate
packages/core/src/content-safety/index.ts exports checkContent
pnpm --filter @cyberoracle/core typecheck passes
Import test: a test file can import { PalmReadingResultSchema, loadPrompt, checkContent } from '@cyberoracle/core'

features.description: Poster render pipeline — satori + resvg-js JSX-to-PNG conversion server function
acceptanceSteps: Create packages/poster/src/render/render-server.ts with renderToPng(component, data, options) function
renderToPng takes a React element + width (default 1080) and returns Promise<Buffer>
Loads Noto Serif SC font subset from packages/poster/fonts/ for Chinese text rendering
Returns valid PNG buffer (starts with PNG magic bytes 0x89504E47)
Throws descriptive error if font files are missing
Test file: packages/poster/src/render/__tests__/render-server.test.ts validates PNG output

features.description: Base poster layout component — reusable satori-compatible layout with poster styles
acceptanceSteps: Create packages/poster/src/components/PosterLayout.tsx as a React component
Props: { title: string, sections: Array<{heading: string, content: string}>, footer?: string, width?: number }
Renders with cream background (#F8F5EE) and dark text (#1F1B16)
Includes gold accent divider lines between sections (#9A7B3F)
Watermark placeholder area in bottom-right corner
Component is satori-compatible (no external CSS, inline styles only)
Test: renders to satori VDOM without error with sample data

features.description: Poster preview script — local PNG preview from sample data via tsx
acceptanceSteps: Create packages/poster/scripts/preview.ts using renderToPng with PosterLayout + sample data
pnpm preview:poster generates test PNG to packages/poster/preview-output.png
Output PNG is viewable in standard image viewers (correct dimensions, Chinese text renders)
pnpm preview:poster:watch watches src/ for changes and regenerates on save

features.description: UI package base exports + Tailwind integration scaffolding
acceptanceSteps: packages/ui/src/index.ts exports empty component stubs (CrystalBall, UploadDropzone, NeonText, StreamingPoster)
Each stub is a named export that can be imported without error
packages/ui package.json peerDependencies are correctly set up
pnpm --filter @cyberoracle/ui typecheck passes

features.description: Cross-package integration verification — full typecheck + test + build suite passes
acceptanceSteps: pnpm typecheck passes with zero errors across all packages and apps
pnpm test passes for packages/core and packages/poster (all unit tests green)
pnpm build:web completes without errors
pnpm build:server completes without errors
All workspace imports (core→tokens, poster→core, web→core/poster/ui/tokens) resolve correctly
